title: maxillaria monteverdensis
intro: Maxillaria monteverdensis, also known as the 'Purple Pansy Orchid', is a species of orchid native to Costa Rica. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Maxillaria monteverdensis include the potential treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating wounds and reducing pain. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used topically as poultices or creams.
